scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/web && npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/transport && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/protocol-mavlink && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/param-metadata && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/ardupilot-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
